metadata.description: Leporello plugins for broadcast producers — author and deploy on-air interactives from Claude.

plugins.name: leporello-asset-bundle-author
plugins.description: Build broadcast-ready Leporello interactives in plain English and deploy them to your organization. Includes the Leporello design system, the mcp.leporello.tv connector, and a /leporello-setup that installs Node/Python prerequisites for you.
